arts.sum: Newcastle United chief executive Darren Eales has indicated that the club's search for a new CEO will not affect the Magpies' performance in the January transfer window. Eales, speaking at the We Are United event last week, said: "I mentioned at the time I had a notice period so the intention is it is business as usual.
